nasb.text: For this reason I say to you, her sins, which are many, have been forgiven, for she loved much; but he who is forgiven little, loves little.”

esv.text: Therefore I tell you, her sins, which are many, are forgiven—for she loved much. But he who is forgiven little, loves little.”

cnv.text: 所以我告訴你，她許多罪都蒙赦免了，因為她的愛多；那赦免少的，愛就少。”

ccb.text: 所以我告诉你，她众多的罪都被赦免了，因此她的爱深切；那些获得赦免少的，他们的爱也少。”

csbs.text: 故此，我告诉你：她的罪孽被赦免得多，所以她爱得多；而那被赦免少的，就爱得少。”
